title: Configure Access to Multiple Clusters — Create a second configuration file
text:
In your
config-exercise
directory, create a file named
config-demo-2
with this content:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Config
preferences
:
{}
contexts
:
-
context
:
cluster
:
development
namespace
:
ramp
user
:
developer
name
:
dev-ramp-up
The preceding configuration file defines a new context named
dev-ramp-up
.
